description: Region Detail Modal force display: Show the total force of each clan present in the province, calculated using the existing calculateForce() function which accounts for all bonuses (Luna 2x, Oni of Skulls honor-based force, card upgrades, etc.). Also add monster name tooltips when hovering monster icons in the region detail.
steps: In the component, for each owner group, call calculateForce(province, ownerId, gameState) to get the total force value

Display the force value next to or below the clan name in the group header, styled with a sword/force icon and the numeric value (e.g., a small crossed-swords icon + '4'). Use the BushiIcon at small size or create a simple force indicator.

For monster figures specifically, find the owner's monster season cards and show the monster name in the tooltip. The existing getMonsterInfo function already handles this logic but currently only shows in tooltipText. Make sure the tooltip shows the full monster name prominently.
acceptance_criteria: The region detail modal shows the total computed force for each clan present in that province
Force calculation accounts for all bonuses (Luna double force, card upgrades, honor-based effects)
Monster figure tooltips show the monster card name
